title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Lifestyle - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Lifestyle! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Faridabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Lifestyle:
Lifestyle is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle!
